Source   Edit  

This file handles rendering for PBR.

Imports

common, models, shaders

Types

DebugView = enum
  dvLit, dvUnlit, dvNormals, dvAoBake, dvMetallic, dvSpecular
Source   Edit

environmentMapId: GLuint

Consts

envMapSize = 512
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc drawPbr(node: Node; transform, view, proj: Mat4; tint: Color;
             useTrs = true; ambientLightColor = color(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 1);
             sunLightDirection = vec3(1, 4, 2);
             sunLightColor = color(1, 1, 1, 1);
             rimLightDirection = vec3(-1, 1, -1);
             rimLightColor = color(0, 0, 0, 0); debugView = dvLit;
             cameraPosition = vec3(0, 0, 10)) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, GLerror, GltfError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Draws a node tree with PBR shading. Source   Edit   
proc drawPbrWithShadow(node: Node; transform, view, proj: Mat4; tint: Color;
                       sunLightDirection = vec3(1, 4, 2); useTrs = true;
                       ambientLightColor = color(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 1);
                       sunLightColor = color(1, 1, 1, 1);
                       rimLightDirection = vec3(-1, 1, -1);
                       rimLightColor = color(0, 0, 0, 0); debugView = dvLit;
                       cameraPosition = vec3(0, 0, 10)) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, GLerror, GltfError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Draws a node tree with PBR shading and shadows. Source   Edit   
proc drawSkybox(view, proj: Mat4; lod: float32 = 0.0) {....raises: [GLerror],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Draws the skybox using a full-screen quad. Source   Edit   
proc loadDefaultEnvironmentMap() {....raises: [GLerror, PixieError], tags: [],
                                   forbids: [].}
Loads a small procedural studio cubemap. Source   Edit   
proc loadEnvironmentMap(cubeMapPath: string) {....raises: [GLerror, PixieError],
    tags: [RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads an environment map from a cube texture path. Source   Edit   
proc loadSolidEnvironmentMap(color = rgbx(180, 190, 220, 255)) {.
    ...raises: [GLerror], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Loads a solid-color cubemap. Source   Edit   
proc setupPbr() {....raises: [GLerror, GltfError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Sets up the PBR rendering system.
  • Create Environment Map and Framebuffer.
